heading: Appropriations; availability
label: 278q Appropriations; availability
text: Appropriations to carry out the provisions of this chapter may remain available for obligation and expenditure for such period or periods as may be specified in the Acts making such appropriations.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to renumbering by .section 278h of this titlePub. L. 107–305Another section 32 of , was renumbered section 35 and is set out as a Short Title note under .act Mar. 3, 1901, ch. 872section 271 of this title

Amendments1980— substituted “Appropriations” for “(a) Appropriations” and struck out subsec. (b) which authorized appropriations to carry out provisions of this chapter, including the Working Capital Fund referred to in , but excluding , of such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 1979 and 1980.Pub. L. 96–461section 278b(a) of this titlesection 278f of this title1978— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 95–322
